title: Rapid Mexican Fennel Tostada
description: A quick and easy Mexican dish featuring fennel and kombu cold extract, perfect for a satvik friendly meal. This dish is a funky twist on traditional tostadas with a glassy jelly texture.
instructions: Soak the kombu sheet in 2 cups of water for 30 minutes to make the cold extract.
Strain the kombu extract and discard the solids.
In a blender, combine the kombu extract, lime juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper, and blend until smooth.
In a small saucepan, combine the blended mixture and agar agar powder, and whisk until the agar agar is dissolved.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 5 minutes, or until the mixture has thickened into a glassy jelly texture.
Arrange the corn tortillas on a baking sheet and toast in the oven at 400 degrees for 5 minutes, or until crispy and lightly browned.
Top each tortilla with a slice of fennel, a spoonful of the jelly mixture, and a sprinkle of cilantro and diced avocado.
